title: Lydia Hammer’s CV
text:
Student, Accountant, Business Analyst.

lydnsutton@gmail.com | My LinkedIn  | Download PDF



A Business Analytics & Accounting Student at BYU-Idaho.


Excel, SQL, Python, R, Power BI, various tax softwares, Quickbooks



Busniess analytics, accounting, consulting, operations, business management, finance




Sep 2024 - current Brigham Young University Idaho

Bachelors Degree

Aug 2021 - May 2024 Utah Valley University

Associates Degree

Aug 2021 - May 2024 Salem Hills High School



2026 Bronze & Silver Career Success Certification, BYU-Idaho



2025 Webinar Attendance Analysis - consulting project done with R and Excel for a small business
2025 Churn Analysis Dashboard - analysis project done in Excel for a small business



Sep 2025 - current Associate Accountant, Miskin & Associates

Prepared clients tax documents
Assisted with bookkeeping and financial reconciliation
Created a Break Even Analysis report for a client

Aug 2021 - Apr 2025 Administrative Assistant, Vyde Tax & Accounting

Assisted with bookkeeping and data entry
Completed 500+ BOI reports for clients
